text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism within the Karpathy AutoResearch loop. This will dynamically prioritize and consolidate memory based on recent, high-impact changes, effectively preventing the 'recent noise' issue. This ensures the agent focuses on preserving the most crucial data, improving the efficiency of the hierarchical structure and accelerating the overall process.
reason: This addition enhances the plan's adaptability and efficiency by ensuring that only the most relevant and impactful memories are retained, rather than being discarded by noise. It aligns with the goal of achieving a 10x cost reduction and 10x performance improvement.
